description: ERC-7730 Localization Translation File Schema. A translation file provides a flat map of translation keys to translated strings for a specific locale. It is referenced from the '$localization' field of a parent ERC-7730 document.

$schema.title: Schema
$schema.description: The schema this translation file conforms to.

$locale.title: Locale
$locale.description: The BCP-47 language tag for this translation (e.g. 'fr', 'zh-Hans', 'pt-BR'). MUST match the key used in the parent document's '$localization.references' map.

translations.title: Translations
translations.description: Flat map from translation key to the translated string in the target locale. Keys MUST match the pattern '^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*(\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*)*$'. Keys in the 'common.' namespace are reserved for a shared vocabulary package; see the specification for resolution precedence. Placeholders in interpolated strings (e.g. '{value}', '{to}') MUST be preserved verbatim in translations. Keys absent from this map fall back to the corresponding literal field value.
